description:
A modern self-hosted music player.


0.18.0 is here! Thanks to all contributors as usual!
Added
- Added option to show desktop notifications when the current track changes (#844)
- Added sl language
Changed
- Use proper tag labels in list filters (#996) (Thanks @Lyall-A)
- Updated macOS window close to better match native behavior (#999) (Thanks @geminiwen)
Fixed
- Fixed rating from the context menu not working when clicked (#985)
- Fixed playerbar button behavior when Playerbar fullscreen toggle is enabled
- Fixed list results when search is cleared on the Artist Discography and Genre pages
- Fixed player shuffle interaction where if played, the first song of an album would always be the first song in the queue (#839)
- Fixed Discord RPC in cases where Discord is opened after Feishin has already attempted to initialize the connection (#996) (Thanks @Lyall-A)
- Fixed application crashing in certain instances on pages with a table view (#998)
- Fixed API translated lyrics styling to match existing lyrics (#982) (Thanks @ENDlezZenith)
What's Changed
- port over ND stalebot by @kgarner7 in https://github.com/jeffvli/feishin/pull/991
- Fix ContextMenu star menu clicking by @kgarner7 in https://github.com/jeffvli/feishin/pull/987
- Bump brace-expansion from 1.1.11 to 1.1.12 in the npm_and_yarn group across 1 directory by @dependabot in https://github.com/jeffvli/feishin/pull/955
- fix navidrome filter labels by @Lyall-A in https://github.com/jeffvli/feishin/pull/995
- Translation Display Normalization by @ENDlezZenith in https://github.com/jeffvli/feishin/pull/982
- Automatically reconnect to Discord RPC at interval by @Lyall-A in https://github.com/jeffvli/feishin/pull/996
- Fix app freeze on undefined cell options by @jeffvli in https://github.com/jeffvli/feishin/pull/998
- macOS: change window close behavior, like other macOS native App by @geminiwen in https://github.com/jeffvli/feishin/pull/999
New Contributors
- @geminiwen made their first contribution in https://github.com/jeffvli/feishin/pull/999
Full Changelog: https://github.com/jeffvli/feishin/compare/v0.17.0...v0.18.0
